title: masdevallia × alvaroi
intro: Masdevallia × alvaroi, also known as the 'Alvaro's Masdevallia', is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Masdevallia veitchiana and Masdevallia venulosa. This unique plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties which help relieve congestion and coughs. The Masdevallia × alvaroi plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting a good night's sleep, making it a sought-after remedy for those suffering from sleep disorders. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties in a convenient and accessible way.
